summary.intent: Implement framework-agnostic Toolbar core state machine in ars-components crate with comprehensive testing and spec updates
summary.outcome: Successfully implemented Toolbar core with State/Event/Context/Props/Messages/Part/Machine/Api structure, achieving 95.9% line coverage and 97.4% region coverage. Added spec conformance and proptest tests. Created PR and branch codex/issue-276-toolbar-core. Adapter implementations (Leptos/Dioxus) deferred.

repo: Services reject empty IDs - all tests must supply an id parameter
cargo insta test --unreferenced=reject fails with pre-existing feature-gated utility/highlight snapshots; workaround is --features i18n
Detached HEAD state requires creating a branch before making file changes
cargo xtask must compile from scratch on fresh checkout
GitHub Projects API requires multiple calls to discover correct field/option IDs for status updates
Project uses cargo xci --profile fast as 10-gate CI verification before commits

code.finding: Audit found on_props_changed emitted prop-sync event but transition ignored it; fixed by creating SetProps event that carries new props through the state machine

workflow: Proptest tests marked as ignored for nightly test suite
snapshot-reviewed label still needs to be applied after PR creation
.agents/skills/waiting-for-codex-review/SKILL.md workflow needs to be invoked for PR review
TDD approach: write tests first, implement to pass, then audit for correctness

friction: Initial detached HEAD state required branch creation before proceeding
cargo xtask full recompilation on fresh checkout delayed initial setup
GitHub Projects API discovery for correct field/option IDs required multiple trial calls
snapshot test infrastructure complexity with feature-gated files requiring specific cargo flags
open_items: Defer Leptos and Dioxus adapter implementations to future tasks
Monitor CI verification with cargo xci --profile fast before next steps
